title: Feature Request: Vertical Connections Tabs List
author: ThiagoMMontenegro
body_snippet:
With connections names being horizontal (as any other written word) would be good to have all connections listed horizontally in the left (or even right) side of the screen rather the horizontally on the top of the screen. 

Here's an example:
![mRemoteNG_VerticalTabs](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/62249584/211619045-e246724a-41c2-4503-acde-f6c3eb234a05.jpg)

iterations.description: Feature request for vertical connection tabs with no implementation details, no reproducible steps, and triage comment requesting retest on current build before proceeding.

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet: hello, yes that option is planed for new release 1.78

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
